history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A drummer is captured in motion, playing a drum set. The image has a blurred, streaky effect, suggesting fast movement and a low shutter speed. The drummer, wearing a black t-shirt, is leaning back with their head tilted upwards, hair flying, mid-action. The drum kit, with cymbals and drums, is also heavily blurred, appearing as abstract shapes and lines. The lighting is dramatic, with bright highlights on the drums and a spotlight effect on the drummer's face and upper body, creating a strong contrast with the dark background. The overall color palette is muted, with dominant tones of black, white, and grey, with hints of warm light. The mood is energetic, dynamic, and intense, conveying the raw power and passion of live music performance. The style is abstract and impressionistic due to the motion blur.
